primary_sources.title: SPR records: MP-Marang continuous since GE11 (2004)
Liow, J. Piety and Politics — Islamism in Contemporary Malaysia (Oxford, 2009)

notes: PAS president since 2002 (24-year tenure, the longest of any current major-party leader). Drove PAS's exit from Pakatan Rakyat 2015 over hudud disagreement with DAP. Architect of Muafakat Nasional (PAS-UMNO MoU 2019) and PN. Theological gravitas: trained at Al-Azhar and the Islamic University of Medina. The single most institutionally stable leader in current Malaysian politics.
